authority_label: General Assembly of Example Civil Society Cooperative
title: Settled mandate authorising EU consultation representation 2026-2027
subtitle: General Assembly approval of representation mandate

claim_fields.member_approval_basis: General Assembly resolution 2026/04/15-03 passed by two-thirds supermajority under bylaws article 7.2, 142 of 198 voting members in favour, recorded in minutes 2026-04-15
claim_fields.mandate_scope: Representation in European Commission public consultations on agricultural data governance and digital identity for cooperatives, including written submissions and panel participation, with no authority to bind the issuer to financial commitments
claim_fields.authorised_representative_org: European Federation of Civil Society Cooperatives

recipients.org_name: European Federation of Civil Society Cooperatives
recipients.purpose: Receipt of mandate as basis for representing the issuer in named scope
Annual governance audit verification of mandate settlement
Verification of representative authority in consultation submissions
